summary: Good matrix recording with wide ambience and clear drum/cymbal balance, capturing a solid 1993 performance.
review: The matrix source offers a nicely balanced soundstage—no phase problems, spacious ambience and crisp drum placement—with especially good cymbal definition. The show is described as fairly well‑played and inspired, marking 1993 as one of the last years Jerry Garcia felt truly OK on stage.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed review rates the show 4/5 and praises the recording quality, leading to a solid overall rating around four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No phase issues, wide ambience, excellent drum layout, nice cymbal balance; overall balanced matrix mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Performance noted as fairly well played and inspired with no major hiccups mentioned.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Reviewer notes 1993 was the last year Jerry Garcia felt OK, with better vocal effort thanks to in‑ear monitors.
band_member_comments.Drums: Nice drum layout and improved stereo isolation from plexiglass wall between drummers; cymbal balance highlighted.
